title: Zombie Illagers +Fresh Animations
description: Adds zombie illager textures to zombie villagers holding a specific illager weapon. Now with Fresh Animations!
body:
# 📖 About
Adds zombie illager textures to zombie villagers holding a specific illager weapon. Now with Fresh Animations!

## 📝 Features
This pack adds zombie illager textures when zombie villagers are holding either an iron axe (for vindicators), a crossbow (for pillagers), a totem of undying (for evokers), a bow (for illusioners), a glass bottle (for witches) or a bundle (for wandering traders?).

## ❗Important Info
Entity Texture Feautures (ETF), Entity Model Features (EMF) and Fresh Animations are required for this recourcepack to work correctly!

Do not forget to activate the recourcepack in options!

If you are using another villager/illager recourcepack, do not worry! More optional support packs for some of these packs will come soon!

### ℹ️ Extra Info
This resource pack gives life to your world—especially if you're using datapacks!

I hope this pack encourages datapack creators to pick the undead illager theme for their builds!

[<- Regular Zombie Illagers Recource Pack](https://modrinth.com/project/vjOtmmGd)

Support packs:

[Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/project/R0lukkxm)
